journal_entry.description: Moving services revenue received via certified cheque
journal_entry.rationale: Atlas Van Lines provided moving services and received immediate payment by certified cheque. Cash increases (asset), revenue is recognized. HST at 13% is collected on the taxable service and recorded as HST Payable (liability).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Moving services provided for $25,500 with immediate payment by certified cheque. Cash (asset) increases by total amount including HST. Revenue recognized at $25,500. HST at 13% ($3,315) collected and recorded as liability. Debit tuple: 1 asset increase (Cash). Credit tuple: 1 revenue increase (Moving Services Revenue). HST Payable is additional tax line.
